overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city with elevated highways, skyscrapers, and pedestrians. The clip features a mix of natural sunlight and artificial neon lighting as the character explores the urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following another pedestrian through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: woman in black top and white shorts walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: tall structures with neon signage and advertisements lining the sidewalk
large purple digital billboard displaying an animated character
multi-lane road with moving vehicles and traffic
paved pedestrian walkway with tile pattern

segments.scene_description: Walking along a city sidewalk with commercial buildings on the right featuring neon billboards. The character follows a pedestrian ahead while vehicles move along the street to the left.

events.description: exits enclosed sidewalk area into open highway overpass view with expanded skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway overpass pathway, observing the elevated road structure and cityscape

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with multiple levels and support columns
safety barrier along the walkway edge overlooking the lower level
dense green trees and plants growing in the space beneath the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to reveal a massive highway overpass structure. The character walks along a concrete pathway next to the railing, with vegetation visible below the elevated highways and the skyline expanding into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange observation point with skyscraper views

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at skyscrapers and a flying vehicle in the sky
camera pans right to reveal the complex highway interchange and traffic flow

agents.ego_description: stops walking to look up at the architecture and flying vehicle, then observes the multi-level highway traffic

entered.detail: futuristic aircraft hovering in the sky between buildings
tall glass and steel buildings covered with digital billboards
complex network of curved highway ramps with vehicles moving on multiple levels
tall corporate building with 'MILITECH' signage visible on facade
industrial smoke rising from vents on building structures

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal a flying vehicle and towering skyscrapers against the blue sky, then pans to show the complex highway interchange with vehicles moving on multiple levels and industrial smoke rising from buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with dense neon signage

events.description: multiple vehicles pass by on the elevated highway to the right

agents.ego_description: resumes walking along the pathway, passing other pedestrians while observing the neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction passing by the camera

entered.detail: dense collection of colorful billboards and advertisements covering building facades

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the pathway through a commercial area dense with neon signage. Other pedestrians pass by while traffic moves on the elevated highway structure now visible in the distance to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor that expands into a sweeping view of a futuristic skyline before returning to a crowded commercial district. It begins on a city sidewalk lined with neon billboards, following a pedestrian as vehicles stream past on the adjacent street. As the path opens up, the camera moves along a concrete railing beside a massive highway overpass, revealing patches of vegetation below and a widening view of the city. The perspective then tilts upward to capture a flying vehicle and towering skyscrapers against a blue sky, panning across a complex multi-level highway interchange filled with moving traffic and rising industrial smoke. Finally, the camera settles back into a pedestrian flow, moving through a commercial area dense with neon signage while the elevated highway structures recede into the distance.
